expectations.text: WebSearch queries target multiple Israeli job sites
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 2: 9 queries across il.indeed.com, janglo.net, secrettelaviv.com, wellfound.com, startup.jobs, junio.co.il, alljobs.co.il, drushim.co.il, jobmaster.co.il, gotfriends.co.il

expectations.text: Both Hebrew and English search queries are used
expectations.evidence: 5 English queries + 4 Hebrew queries. Hebrew terms: 'מפתח תוכנה ג׳וניור', 'מתכנת ללא ניסיון'

expectations.text: Results are scored by fit level (High/Medium/Low)
expectations.evidence: Results: '5 High-fit matches', '6 Medium-fit matches', '1 Low-fit', '3 Skipped'
Transcript Step 0: checks ~/.yoad-jobs/preferences.md and ~/.yoad-jobs/job-history.md. Step 6: appends to job-history.md
Every listing shows source: GotFriends, Drushim, startup.jobs, Indeed IL, etc.

expectations.text: JUNIO.co.il is included in the search queries
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 2 query 5: 'junior developer site:junio.co.il'. WebFetch failed (expired cert), fell back to WebSearch.

expectations.text: 403 errors are handled gracefully with WebSearch fallback
expectations.evidence: Transcript: 'startup.jobs and JUNIO.co.il pages were not directly fetchable (403 and expired certificate respectively). Per skill instructions, fell back to WebSearch with site: filter'
